deactivateWarning.title: Deactivate Deck?

impact.reversible: You can reactivate the deck at any time

sections.allDecksDescription: Search and browse all vocabulary and culture decks

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

deckDelete.title: Delete Deck
deckDelete.explanation: This will deactivate the deck, hiding it from all users. The deck and its content will be preserved but no longer accessible. Learner progress data will be retained.
deckDelete.warning: This action cannot be easily undone from the UI.

impact.hidden: The deck will be hidden from all learners
impact.progressPreserved: All user progress will be preserved
impact.canReactivate: You can reactivate the deck through the edit modal

wordEntryDetail.cardsEmpty: No cards have been generated for this word entry

cards.tierTooltip: Tier 1: most common, introduced first. Tier 2: less common. Tier 3+: specialized vocabulary.

eligibility.pluralFormWrongPos: Only available for nouns and adjectives
eligibility.pluralFormMissing: Requires grammar data with singular and plural nominative forms
eligibility.articleMissing: Requires grammar data with gender and nominative singular form
eligibility.sentenceMissing: Requires at least one example with Greek and English text
eligibility.declensionMissing: Requires gender and non-nominative case forms in grammar data

cardDelete.title: Permanently Delete Card
cardDelete.warning: This will permanently delete this item and ALL associated user data including:

states.noDecksFound: No decks found matching your search

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.sub: Send notifications and updates to active learners.

create.linkDescription: Users can click this link in their notification
create.jsonHint: Paste a JSON object with title, message, and optional link_url.
create.switchModeConfirm: Your current input will be cleared. Continue?
create.jsonInvalidJson: Invalid JSON. Please check your syntax.
create.jsonTitleTooLong: Title must be 100 characters or less.
create.jsonMessageTooLong: Message must be 500 characters or less.
create.jsonInvalidUrl: Link URL must be a valid URL.
create.jsonUrlTooLong: Link URL must be 500 characters or less.
create.unsavedDescription: You have unsaved input. Closing will discard your changes.

delete.title: Delete Announcement
delete.warning: This will permanently delete the announcement. Already-sent notifications will NOT be recalled.

preview.label: Notification preview
preview.messagePlaceholder: The body of your message will appear here. Keep it short and friendly — learners get a lot of notifications.
preview.notAvailableInJsonMode: Preview not available in JSON mode

compose.title: Compose announcement
compose.helper: Fill in the details below to create your announcement.

news.title: News
news.sub: {{total}} articles · {{audio}}/{{total}} with B2+A2 audio · {{pending}} awaiting B1

create.title: Create News Item
create.description: Enter news item data as JSON. The backend will download and store the image from source_image_url.
create.hint: Image download may take 2-5 seconds after submission.
create.duplicateUrl: This article URL has already been used
create.imageDownloadFailed: Failed to download image from the provided URL

edit.title: Edit News Item
edit.hint: To change the image, add a valid URL to source_image_url. Leave it as the placeholder text to keep the current image.

delete.title: Delete News Item
delete.warning: This will permanently delete this news item and its image from storage.

validation.invalidCountry: Invalid country. Must be: cyprus, greece, or world
validation.a2FieldsPaired: title_el_a2 and description_el_a2 must both be provided or both omitted
validation.scenePaired: scene_en, scene_el and scene_ru must all be provided or all omitted
validation.sceneFieldsTooLong: scene_en, scene_el, scene_ru, and style_en must each be 1000 characters or fewer
validation.invalidExercise: Invalid `exercise` block. It must contain `prompt` (el/en/ru), `options` (exactly 4 entries with el/en/ru), and `correct_answer_index` (0-3).

search.noResults: No news items match your search

audio.noA2Content: No A2 content — add A2 text to enable audio

dirty.title: Unsaved changes

audio.b1NotShipping: Not generated yet — B1 audio shipping with NLVL-B1

translations.hintEl: Greek translation · used in the app

body.titleB2Hint: This title doubles as the B2 scenario summary today. A dedicated scenario field is on the roadmap.

image.helper: Enter a URL to replace the current image. The original source URL is not stored after upload.

linkedSituation.helper: Every news item can spawn one scenario-based dialog. Learners practice the vocabulary in context after reading.
linkedSituation.emptyText: No situation linked to this article yet.

duplicate.body: Duplicate of an earlier report — closing this one. The fix will ship in the next batch.
duplicate.label: Duplicate

needMoreInfo.body: Thanks for the report. Could you share which level (A2 / B1 / B2) you were practicing at when this came up? That helps narrow it down.
needMoreInfo.label: Need more info

notAnError.body: After checking, this is the correct form. Closing without changes — please reach out via Feedback if you'd like a more detailed explanation.
notAnError.label: Not an error

reRecordAudio.body: Re-recorded with native speaker and re-uploaded. Will roll out in the next release.
